name: French Fudge
recipeIngredient: 13 ounces (1 cup) skim milk evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the evaporated milk, cornstarch, sugar replacement, and chocolate chips in a saucepan.
2. Cook and stir until the mixture is thick and the chocolate chips are melted.
3. Whip the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the chocolate/mixture.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Turn into a buttered 8-inch square baking dish.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Cut into 1-inch squares.
9. Store in the refrigerator.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/4 BREAD EXCHANGE; CAL: 18 PIECE; Source: The Diabetic Chocolate Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand.
